stat.suggestedRebalanceHint: Recommended adjustment as % of total capital. Positive = increase, negative = decrease.
stat.holdingPnlHint: Unrealized P&L based on market price at analysis time. Return rate is cost-basis relative.

cardWall.loadErrorDesc: Please check your network connection and try again.
cardWall.empty: No decision cards — click "Rerun Analysis" to generate.

emptyHero.title: Add your first holding
emptyHero.description: Richman generates daily decision cards based on your real holdings. Add your first holding and analysis will return within seconds.
emptyHero.onboardingHint: Want to follow the guided setup?

skippedNudge.message: You skipped onboarding — walk through it to get familiar with decision cards and risk warnings.

llmBanner.title: AI interpretation configured
llmBanner.description: You have {{count}} holding(s) whose historical cards were generated by the rules engine. Click the button on the right to trigger a re-analysis to upgrade to AI interpretation.
llmBanner.reanalyzeSuccess: Re-analysis triggered — refresh later to see new cards.

message.rerunSuccess: Re-analysis triggered — refresh later to see new cards.
message.rerunError: Re-analysis request failed, please try again later.

notFound.title: Decision card not found
notFound.description: The link is invalid or the decision card does not exist.
notFound.deleted: This decision card may not exist or has been deleted.

loadError.title: Load failed
loadError.description: Unable to load this decision card, please try again later.

hero.targetGap: Target gap: {{gap}}% (suggested rebalance magnitude, not P&L)

dimension.title: Three-Dimensional Reasoning
dimension.flipNote: Note: this dimension's flip is the primary driver of the recommendation upgrade

executionPlan.title: Execution Plan
executionPlan.validDays: This plan applies for the next {{days}} day(s). It will be automatically re-analyzed if stop-loss is triggered or if the validity window expires.

monitor.triggerReason: Reduce if price breaks below stop-loss to limit downside.
monitor.positionReason: Moderate trim to observe before further action.
monitor.precondition: Price closes below stop-loss level on consecutive days.
monitor.fallback: If price recovers above cost, continue holding.

mainRisks.title: Main Risks
mainRisks.noRisks: No significant risks identified in this analysis.
mainRisks.exitCondition: Conditions for exiting this plan: any of the above risks triggered, or the execution plan stop-loss line.

metaSidebar.title: Analysis Metadata
metaSidebar.dataSourcePending: Data source health check will be available in a future version
metaSidebar.disclaimer: This content is for reference only and does not constitute investment advice. Investing involves risk — make decisions carefully.

source.mixedTooltip: Copy generated by AI; recommendation action by rules engine fallback ({{provider}})
source.templateTooltip: Generated by rules engine · Configure an LLM provider to enable AI interpretation

legacyCard.title: Legacy recommendation
legacyCard.empty: No detailed recommendation was recorded for this archived card.

marketContext.title: Market Quote
marketContext.outsideRange: Analysis time is outside chart range

quickHoldingForm.hint: Suitable if you've already held for a while — just enter the average cost.

validation.positionRatioRange: Position ratio must be between 0 and 100

tagModeForm.hint: Tag mode: just pick a position tier — cost price is auto-filled from current market price.

riskPreference.title: Choose Risk Preference
riskPreference.description: Your risk preference influences how aggressively the AI recommends adjusting your positions. You can change it any time in Settings.

conservative.label: Conservative
conservative.description: Preserve capital with low volatility, accepting lower returns

moderate.label: Moderate
moderate.description: Balance return and risk, tolerating moderate market swings

aggressive.label: Aggressive
aggressive.description: Pursue higher returns, comfortable with significant price swings

upgradeTag.label: Add Details
upgradeTag.tooltip: This holding was created in tag mode. Click Edit to add cost and position for more accurate analysis.

concentrationAlert.error: {{type}} exposure is severely concentrated ({{ratio}}%) — strongly consider reducing
concentrationAlert.info: {{type}} allocation reached {{ratio}}% — at the upper end of institutional recommendations

llmConfigGuide.title: Unlock AI Deep Analysis
llmConfigGuide.description: Configure an LLM provider so Richman can generate AI-powered insights and execution recommendations tailored to your holdings.

screenshotModal.title: Screenshot Recognition — Review
screenshotModal.recognizedCount: Recognized {{count}} holdings · Please check highlighted fields before confirming import
screenshotModal.uploadHint: Click or drag a screenshot here to upload
screenshotModal.uploadHintDesc: Supports single PNG / JPEG / WebP, max 5 MB
screenshotModal.capWarning: You have {{current}} holdings and selected {{selected}} — max {{limit}} reached

validation.noRowSelected: Please select at least one recognized result

confidence.medium: Recognition confidence is medium — please verify

empty.title: Add your first holding

feedback.error: Failed to submit feedback — please try again later
feedback.unavailable: Feedback becomes available after the first analysis runs

market.registerCTA: Sign up for Richman and get a personalized investment execution plan

freshness.mild: Price has moved {{percent}}% since last analysis — current score may not reflect the latest trend
freshness.moderate: Price has moved significantly by {{percent}}% — current analysis may be outdated, use with caution
freshness.severe: Price has moved {{percent}}% — current analysis is no longer reliable, do not trade based on this score

d1.name: Macro Rates
d1.explanation: TIPS yield (real interest rate net of inflation) directly impacts the pricing of non-yielding assets like gold.

d2.name: USD Liquidity
d2.explanation: The USD index and global liquidity conditions affect gold's relative attractiveness.

d3.name: Structural Demand
d3.explanation: Central bank purchases and ETF flow changes reflect institutional allocation intent for gold over the medium-to-long term.

d4.name: Technical Position
d4.explanation: Price position relative to moving averages and historical support/resistance reflects short-term market momentum.

demoPlan.disclaimer: Based on a demo holding — not personalized for you
